prompt: Rank from shortest to longest electromagnetic wavelength of visible colors

items.name: Violet
items.fact: ~400 nm — highest frequency of visible light

items.name: Blue
items.fact: ~470 nm — scatters easily, making sky look blue

items.name: Green
items.fact: ~530 nm — human eye is most sensitive to green

items.name: Yellow
items.fact: ~580 nm — high visibility, used for warning signs

items.name: Red
items.fact: ~700 nm — longest wavelength, scatters the least
